Title: Resolve blocker 1
Description: Anti-corruption layer required for legacy/shared dependencies.
ExitCriteria: Blocker is mitigated or accepted with rollback plan.

Title: Resolve blocker 2
Description: HttpContext usage: Direct HttpContext access leaks transport concerns into domain/application layers.
ExitCriteria: Blocker is mitigated or accepted with rollback plan.

Title: Resolve blocker 3
Description: HttpContext usage: Porting to microservices requires extensive rewiring of request-scoped context logic.
ExitCriteria: Blocker is mitigated or accepted with rollback plan.

Title: Resolve blocker 4
ExitCriteria: Blocker is mitigated or accepted with rollback plan.

Title: Stabilize Service Boundary
Description: Freeze and validate contracts for Price before extraction.
ExitCriteria: Contract tests are green for public/admin/internal endpoints.

Title: Read Path Extraction
Description: Move read-only APIs first to reduce data-write risk.
ExitCriteria: Read API parity and latency targets are met.

Title: Write Path and Data Transition
Description: Transition writes with controlled shared database period.

Title: Background Jobs and Monolith Decommission
Description: Migrate legacy-hosted jobs and remove monolith runtime dependency.
ExitCriteria: No production traffic executes in extracted monolith modules.
Runbook and SLO ownership transferred to service team.
